name: @health/load-testing
description: k6 and Gatling load tests for HealthEcosystem

scripts.load:lims:local: cross-env BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 ORDERS_PER_HOUR=3600 k6 run scripts/load/lims-throughput.js
scripts.load:devices:local: cross-env BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000 MESSAGES_PER_MIN=600 k6 run scripts/load/device-messages.js
scripts.load:all:smoke: npm run load:gateway:local && npm run load:lims:local && npm run load:devices:local
